---

- [ ] US1 — Compute family-aware kickoff confidence and thresholding: choose inject, minimal, or abstain using family-scoped confidence rules.
- [ ] US2 — Return one-line inclusion reasons for kickoff entities: make every included entity explain why it survived policy and ranking.
- [ ] US3 — Recommend pull-on-demand when kickoff confidence is low: abstain honestly while preserving later graph retrieval.

Full stories: `docs/themes/TH6-precision-governed-advisory-kickoff/epics/E2-confidence-provenance-and-abstention/stories/`
